headlines.headline: Talvix Holdings secures $75M contract with a national infrastructure agency

sentiment.reasoning: A $75M contract with a national agency provides reliable, high-quality revenue growth for Talvix Holdings.

headlines.headline: Orevar Marketplace secures $500M contract with a multinational manufacturer

headlines.headline: Holtum Asset Group announces $6.3B share buyback program

sentiment.reasoning: A $6.3B share buyback program is a direct, positive signal of capital allocation efficiency and management confidence in the stock.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
